title: Robert Irwin: A Desert of Pure Feeling
original_title: Robert Irwin: A Desert of Pure Feeling
overview: An in-depth look at the career of iconoclastic artist Robert Irwin, whose investigations into the nature of perception have radically expanded the possibilities of what art can be.
